	xch A, R1
	xch A, 82h
	xch A, R1
	xch A, R2
	xch A, 83h
	xch A, R2
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	djnz R3, jump_0401
	djnz R0, jump_0401
	ret

	ljmp jump_0421

	mov 83h, R2
; overlapping 1 byte(s)
